creator: rchipi@talarion.com
text:
When running X the characters inside the window area of
an xterm session, for example, do not show.  Apparently
characters are shown with black foreground on a black background.
This seems to be related to bitblt and it doesnt show up at 640x480
and 16bpp.

Fix: 

Use no_bitblt at 800x600 or use 640x480 resolution.
Does anyone know how to resolve this problem in the server?
How-To-Repeat: Configure SVGA server with SiS5597/5598 at 800x600 with 16bpp.
I am using WindowMaker but it's the same with KDE.
